name: HRC_ARM_APPROVAL_OPTIONS
description: This table stores the configurable options associated with each approval process.

columns.Name: APPROVAL_OPTIONS_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key and unique identifier

columns.Name: AI_COMMENT_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Store AI Comment feature is enabled or not.

columns.Name: ARCHIVE_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Duration after which a completed transaction for the approval process can be moved from main transaction store to the archive data store.

columns.Name: PURGE_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Duration after which an archived transaction for the approval process becomes a candidate to be purged from the system.

columns.Name: PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRC_ARM_PROCESS tables.

columns.Name: APPROVAL_DISABLED
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate if approvals are disabled for an approval process.

columns.Name: ASYNC_BYPASS_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Store async bypass is enabled or not

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ALERT_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Used as a check before triggering alerts automatically

columns.Name: SEND_TO_USERS
columns.Comments: This is used to store whether the alerts should be sent to individual users or not

columns.Name: ALERT_TEMPLATE_OBJECT_GUID
columns.Comments: This is used for maintaining consistency of seeed data framework.

columns.Name: IS_PARALLEL_TXN_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Used to store user preference of enabling/disabling Parallel Transactions.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
